title: Aehr Test Systems Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2024 Financial Results
text: Aehr Test Systems announced Q3 fiscal 2024 financial results. Net revenue reached $7.6 million, down from $17.2 million in Q3 FY2023. GAAP net loss was $1.5 million, or $0.05 per diluted share. Non-GAAP net loss totaled $0.9 million, or $0.03 per diluted share. Bookings for the quarter were $24.5 million with a backlog of $20 million. Cash and equivalents reached $47.6 million with no debt. Nine-month results showed net revenue of $49.6 million versus $42.7 million in the prior year period. Nine-month GAAP net income was $9.3 million, or $0.31 per diluted share, and non-GAAP net income was $11.0 million, or $0.37 per diluted share. CEO Gayn Erickson noted that delays in wafer level burn-in system orders for silicon carbide semiconductor devices used in electric vehicles impacted Q3 results. The company announced a new customer order and reported ongoing engagements with multiple silicon carbide suppliers. Reiterated full-year FY2024 guidance includes total revenue greater than $65 million and GAAP net income of approximately $11 million or more, which translates to $0.38 per diluted share.
